sections.paragraph:
μ´ numerical sign = 40 (τεσσε[α]ράκοντα; Diod S 22, 13, 2) Ac 10:41 D; Hs 9, 4, 3; 9, 5, 4; 9, 15, 4; 9, 16, 5; GJs 1:4 Bodmer.—Pauly-W. XVI 1661.

Diod S Diod S , I b.c.—List 5

D D = Didache, except that in a list of manuscripts or as textual variant D refers to Codex Bezae—List 1

Hs Hs = Similitudes

GJs GJs = Gospel of James (Protevangelium Jacobi), II a.d.—List 1

Pauly-W Pauly-W = AP./GW., Real-Encyclopädie der klassischen Altertumswissenschaft—List 6

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 608
